modules.emotionalValidation: It's okay to feel anxious. Allah has given us verses and practices to find peace. Your heart can find rest in His remembrance.

verses.arabicText: الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ
verses.translation: Those who have believed and whose hearts are assured by the remembrance of Allah. Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured.
He sent down upon you slumber (nu'ass) as a security from Him.
Allah takes away the souls at the time of their death, and those that die not during their sleep. He returns them upon waking for an appointed term.

sunnahPractices.title: Tasbeeh Fatimah
sunnahPractices.description: Say SubhanAllah 33 times, Alhamdulillah 33 times, Allahu Akbar 34 times before sleep.

sunnahPractices.title: Wudu Before Sleep
sunnahPractices.description: Perform ablution as you do for prayer before going to bed.

sunnahPractices.title: Recite Ayat-ul-Kursi
sunnahPractices.description: Whoever recites it at night, Allah appoints a guardian for him and Shaytan will not approach him until morning.

regulationLayer.instruction: Repeat 'Ya Salaam' slowly with 4-second inhale and 6-second exhale.

reflectionPrompts: What exactly is causing my anxiety tonight?
Can I surrender this to Allah and trust His plan?
modules.closingAffirmation: Allah is As-Salaam, the Source of Peace. My heart finds rest in His remembrance.

modules.emotionalValidation: Fear and bad dreams can be distressing. The Prophet (PBUH) taught us specific Ruqyah practices for protection. You are not alone.

verses.translation: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful. [Full Surah Al-Fatiha]
verses.hadithRef: Sahih al-Bukhari (5736) - Al-Fatiha used as Ruqyah

verses.translation: Ayatul Kursi - The Verse of the Throne. Reciting it provides a guardian from Allah until morning.
The Three Quls - Recite 3 times, blow into your cupped palms, and wipe over your body.

sunnahPractices.title: Blow Into Hands and Wipe Body
sunnahPractices.description: Recite the Three Quls (112-114) three times, blow into your cupped palms, and wipe them over your body starting from head and face.

sunnahPractices.title: If You Have a Bad Dream
sunnahPractices.description: Spit lightly to your left three times and seek refuge in Allah from the evil of what you saw.

regulationLayer.instruction: Recite Ruqyah verses (Al-Fatiha, Ayatul Kursi, Three Quls) for protection.

reflectionPrompts: What did the dream make me feel?
I seek refuge in Allah from evil - both seen and unseen.
modules.closingAffirmation: Allah is my Guardian. No harm shall touch me without His permission.

modules.emotionalValidation: When your mind won't stop, remember: Whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient. Place your trust in Him.

verses.translation: And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him.
Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal wakeel - Sufficient for us is Allah, and He is the best disposer of affairs.

reflectionPrompts: What exactly am I trying to control that only Allah controls?
Can I release this thought and trust Allah's plan?
modules.closingAffirmation: Allah is sufficient for me. He is the best disposer of my affairs.

modules.emotionalValidation: Do not despair of Allah's mercy. He is Al-Ghafoor, the All-Forgiving. His mercy encompasses all things.

verses.translation: Say: O My servants who have transgressed against themselves! Do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins.
Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.

sunnahPractices.title: Dua for Forgiveness
sunnahPractices.description: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul 'afwa fa'fu 'anni (O Allah, You are Pardoning and love to pardon, so pardon me).

regulationLayer.instruction: Recite the forgiveness dua before sleep.

reflectionPrompts: Have I sought forgiveness from Allah?
Allah's mercy is greater than my mistakes.
modules.closingAffirmation: I am forgiven. Allah is Ar-Rahman, the Most Merciful.

modules.emotionalValidation: Sleep is a mercy from Allah - a means of rest. Your soul needs this renewal. Allow yourself to receive it.

verses.translation: And We made your sleep (subaat) as a thing for rest.
And it is He who has made the night for you as clothing.

sunnahPractices.title: 2 Rak'ah Light Prayer
sunnahPractices.description: Offer 2 light rak'ah before bed, then make a short dua.

regulationLayer.instruction: Perform Tasbeeh Fatimah after your light prayer.

reflectionPrompts: Have I been gentle with myself today?
Rest is worship when it enables me to serve Allah better.
modules.closingAffirmation: Sleep is a gift from Allah. I accept it with gratitude.

rituals.title: Ablution (Wudu)
rituals.description: The Prophet (PBUH) instructed: Whenever you go to bed, perform ablution as you do for prayer.

rituals.title: Dusting the Bed
rituals.description: Shake or dust your bed three times before lying down to ensure it is clean and free of harmful insects.

rituals.title: Personal Hygiene
rituals.description: Brush your teeth with Miswak or toothbrush before bed - it was the Prophet's (PBUH) habit.

rituals.title: Early Rest
rituals.description: Sleep early after Isha prayer to ensure you can wake easily for Fajr or Tahajjud.

rituals.title: Closing Doors and Lights
rituals.description: Recite Bismillah while closing doors, covering food containers, and extinguishing lamps before retiring.

rituals.title: Sleep Position
rituals.description: Lie on your right side, placing your right hand under your right cheek. Avoid sleeping on your stomach.

rituals.title: Sleep Dua
rituals.description: Allahumma bismika amutu wa ahya (O Allah, in Your name I die and I live). Source: Sahih al-Bukhari (6324)

morningAdhkar.title: Morning Adhkar - Upon Waking
items: Alhamdulillahilladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur (Praise be to Allah who gave us life after death, and to Him is the resurrection).
Recite Ayat-ul-Kursi again in the morning.
La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah... × 100. Source: Sahih al-Bukhari (6403)

tahajjud.title: Tahajjud / Night-Waking Content
tahajjud.whenWaking: La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah... Then make dua - it will be accepted.

verses.translation: Stand the night in prayer, except a little.
And from the night - pray with it as additional for you; perhaps your Lord will raise you to a praised station.
